reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicio, un poco caótica en su atención. Esta bien ubicada al lado de una plaza, un bosque y la ruta. Baños impecables

(Translated by Google)
Gas station, the service is a bit chaotic. It's well located next to a plaza, a forest, and the highway. The restrooms are spotless.

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar parquizado para descansar in rato en el camino. Estirar las piernas , tomar unos mates , usar los baños y seguir 10/10.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful park-like area to rest for a while along the way. Stretch your legs, have some mate, use the restrooms, and continue on. 10/10.
